subject: Public Health
title: Pandemic Preparedness Today
description: A quick win: understand Pandemic Preparedness Today.

hook.text: After COVID-19, countries pledged billions for pandemic preparedness. History says the money will fade.

buildup.text: The Pandemic Fund at the World Bank aims to strengthen surveillance and response in low-income countries.

discovery.text: 100 Days Mission targets developing vaccines, tests, and treatments within 100 days of a new threat.

twist.text: Technology is ready. The bottleneck is always politics, equity, and sustained funding commitments.

climax.text: A pandemic treaty is being negotiated at the WHO—but nations resist binding commitments.

punchline.text: We know what to do. The question is whether we will.

quiz.question: What is the '100 Days Mission'?
options: Developing vaccines, tests, and treatments within 100 days of a new threat
